calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Chris Dewys, via ZOOM, counsel for Pamela Herrera, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises Mr. Dewys regarding whether the petition in this matter was filed in the proper venue and that if the decedent was a resident of California when she died then this petition should have been filed in San Mateo county. Mr. Dewys advises that the decedent had an interest in a real property located in San Francisco and lived in a property located in San Mateo county. After further discussion, the court denies this petition.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
